name: Dirt Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 1/2 oz) instant French, vanilla pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Oreos using a food processor or blender and set aside.
Alternatively, place them in a plastic bag and smash with a rolling pin.
2. Cream together the butter or margarine, cream cheese, and powdered sugar.
3. Combine the milk, pudding, and whipped topping and stir into the creamed mixture.
4. Layer the crushed cookies and pudding mixture in the flower pot, ending with a thick layer of cookie crumbs on top.
5. Refrigerate until serving time.
6. Place the "bouquet" (plastic flowers) in the center and serve by scooping out the dessert.
Serves 10 to 12.
Fresh flowers inserted in a florist water vial can be used instead of plastic flowers.
This is a fun dessert to have on the table throughout the meal without telling anyone. There is always an enjoyable reaction at the surprise "unveiling".
